name: Akira Katsuragi
bio: Seeking truth through empirical knowledge and philosophical inquiry.

name: Kaito Ryūjin
bio: Emphasizing the beauty of human experience through art, music, and storytelling.

name: Takeru Shinoda
bio: Believing in humanity's potential to shape its own destiny through collective action and responsible leadership.

name: Renn Kaito
bio: Pursuing the hidden truths behind the lost legends, convinced that by unraveling their mysteries, we can unlock new paths of growth.
speech_style: Eloquent, employing cryptic phrases and veiled hints to convey his insights
motivation: Exploration (the desire to uncover new knowledge and push the boundaries of human understanding)
